extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters by direction and category: against the Company shows criminal 0, tax 4, statutory/regulatory 0 and Rs. 407.07 lakh; the Company row adds criminal 1, tax 0, statutory/regulatory 0 and Rs. 4.11 lakh; the Group Companies row shows criminal 5, tax 0, statutory/regulatory 0 and Rs. 31.99 lakh. I counted only these against-company/group rows, excluded the “By our Directors and Promoters” row and excluded the separate personal matters against directors/promoters from the aggregate amount; thus tax proceedings against the Company and subsidiaries are 4, criminal proceedings across all listed entities are 6, regulatory actions are 0, and quantified group litigation is Rs. 443.17 lakh = Rs. 44.317 crore (411.18 lakh for the Company plus 31.99 lakh for Group Companies). No contingent-liabilities table or stated total is disclosed in the provided risk section. The only quantified customer concentration is company-wide single-customer revenue, 92.66% of revenue from operations for FY 2022-23; no company-wide top-5 or top-10 customer percentage is provided, and the source uses Rs. in Lakhs for the litigation table, converted to crore by dividing by 100.
